description: Very large table of accounts in Judaeo-Arabic and Hebrew numerals. Arranged by parsha of the week. Many food items. The fragment shows signs of having been used in a book binding. There is also a jotting of an Arabic-script basmala.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
